events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: structural welding without qualified WPS parameters, inspected/tested stage, AWS D1.1 reference. This is non-compliant - welding must be performed using qualified Welding Procedure Specifications (WPS) per AWS D1.1. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant.
